News Resources Mutual Aid DIY
News Resources Mutual Aid DIY

Mutual Aid

Active Networks

Community fridges, tool libraries, free markets, and childcare pools.

Mutual Aid Hub

Nationwide directory of mutual aid groups organized by location. Find or start a group near you.

directorynational

Food Not Bombs

Decentralized volunteer network sharing free food and highlighting the need to end poverty.

fooddecentralizedinternational

Really Really Free Market

Free community events where people share goods, skills, and services with no exchange or barter.

free-marketcommunityskills-sharing

Little Free Pantry

Community-led network of free neighborhood pantries. Find one near you or build your own.

foodcommunityneighborhood

Tool Library Network

Directory of tool lending libraries across North America — borrow tools instead of buying them.

toolslendingcommunity

Direct Action

Strike support, solidarity funds, and organizing infrastructure.

Mutual Aid Disaster Relief

Grassroots disaster relief network based on solidarity — direct community support without red tape.

disaster-reliefsolidarity

National Domestic Workers Alliance

Organizing domestic workers — nannies, housekeepers, and caregivers — for rights and dignity.

labordomestic-workersorganizing

Showing Up for Racial Justice (SURJ)

Network of white people organizing in their communities for racial justice, with local chapter resources.

racial-justiceorganizingchapters

Strike Support Network

Resources and coordination for supporting striking workers — solidarity funds, picket information, supplies.

strikeslaborsolidarity

Survival

Real-time maps, tools and training for local crisis response.

FEMA Community Resources

Community Emergency Response Team training and resources — local preparedness outside state institutions.

emergencypreparednesscommunity

Direct Relief Aid Map

Worldwide Aid Map from Direct Relief, a humanitarian org dedicated to victims of disasters and the poor.

disastermapreal-time

Direct Relief Healthcare Resources

Individual Resources from Direct Relief, a humanitarian org dedicated to victims of disasters and the poor.

disastermedical aidpoverty

NOVAD Community Resources

Network of volunteer organizations for disaster response — find local groups ready to mobilize.

disasternetworkpreparedness

Know a network we're missing? See the contribute guide →
